title: YLAB 2 x Packs – 15 Christmas Colouring Pencils (30 Total) – Stocking Fillers for Kids – Santa, Snowman & Reindeer Design – Ideal for Christmas Eve Bo - Crayons for Colouring & Crafts
features: 🎨 30 Vibrant Colours (2 x 15 Packs) – Double the festive fun with 2 full sets of rich, bright colouring pencils.
🎅 Festive Santa, Snowman & Reindeer Design – Each pencil is decorated with cute Christmas characters kids will love.
✏️ Perfect for Sharing – Great for siblings, classrooms, or splitting between stockings or gift bags.
🎁 Ideal for Christmas Gifting – Makes a brilliant stocking filler, Christmas Eve box surprise or party bag treat.
🌟 High-Quality Pencils – Smooth to use, easy to sharpen and made from durable materials for long-lasting fun.
description: 🎄 Double the Festive Fun – 2 Packs of Colourful Christmas Pencils! Get ready for a creative Christmas with 2 x 15 packs of Christmas colouring pencils (30 pencils in total). These festive pencils are a brilliant choice for sharing, gifting or splitting between stockings and party bags. 🖍️ 30 Assorted Colours to Inspire Creativity Each pack includes 15 unique colours , giving kids plenty of options to colour, draw and explore their imagination – now doubled with this handy twin pack! 🎅 Adorable Festive Wrapping Each pencil is wrapped in a fun, festive design featuring Santa Claus, snowmen and reindeer , set on a snowy blue background – cheerful and seasonal! ✏️ Just the Right Size for Little Hands At 19cm long , these pencils are ideal for young children, easy to grip and perfect for colouring books or Christmas crafts. 🎁 The Perfect Christmas Gift Idea Whether you're filling two stockings, a Christmas Eve box, or classroom party bags , this 2-pack offers great value and festive cheer for kids aged 3+. 🌟 Quality You Can Count On Made from high-quality materials with smooth leads that sharpen easily, these pencils are both practical and fun. Make your Christmas gifting simple and joyful with this value 2-pack – perfect for creative little elves!
